required_env_vars.name: CALCOM_API_KEY
required_env_vars.description: Cal.com V2 API key with cal_ prefix for Bearer token authentication

required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME
required_env_vars.description: Coach username for building booking URLs

required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_EVENT_SLUG
required_env_vars.description: Event type slug (e.g., 60min) for booking widget

tasks.name: Define Cal.com booking response types

action.target: TypeScript interfaces for Cal.com API responses

tasks.purpose: Establish type safety for Cal.com V2 API booking data structures

constraints: Follow Cal.com V2 API response structure
Export all types for use in client implementation

tasks.input_state: No Cal.com types exist in codebase
tasks.output_state: TypeScript interfaces defined in apps/web/_lib/server/calcom-types.ts for booking responses
tasks.acceptance_criterion: TypeScript interfaces exist for Cal.comBooking, CalcomAttendee, and CalcomBookingsResponse with proper type exports
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/_lib/server/calcom-types.ts && grep -E 'export (interface|type)' apps/web/_lib/server/calcom-types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create Cal.com environment validation schema

action.target: Zod validation schema for Cal.com environment variables

tasks.purpose: Enable fail-fast validation of required Cal.com configuration at module load time

constraints: Validate CALCOM_API_KEY has cal_ prefix
Follow existing pattern from Resend mailer implementation
Schema should be module-level const (not function-scoped)

tasks.input_state: calcom-types.ts exists with booking interfaces, no validation schema
tasks.output_state: Zod schema defined in apps/web/_lib/server/calcom-client.ts validating CALCOM_API_KEY format
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Zod schema validates CALCOM_API_KEY environment variable with cal_ prefix requirement at module scope

tasks.name: Implement Cal.com client class with authentication

action.target: CalcomClient class with Bearer token authentication and required headers

tasks.purpose: Provide authenticated HTTP client for Cal.com V2 API requests

constraints: Include 'server-only' import at top of file
Use Bearer token authentication: Authorization: Bearer cal_<key>
Include required header: cal-api-version: 2024-08-13
Base URL: https://api.cal.com/v2
Follow class-based pattern from Resend mailer

tasks.input_state: Environment validation exists in calcom-client.ts, no client class
tasks.output_state: CalcomClient class with private fetch method and authentication headers in calcom-client.ts
tasks.acceptance_criterion: CalcomClient class exists with constructor, private fetch wrapper that includes Authorization and cal-api-version headers
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 10 'class CalcomClient' apps/web/_lib/server/calcom-client.ts | grep -E '(Authorization|cal-api-version)' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add structured error handling with logger

action.target: Structured logging integration to CalcomClient for error scenarios

tasks.purpose: Enable production debugging with contextual error logging for API failures

constraints: Use async getLogger() pattern
Create logger context object with name and relevant metadata
Log errors with logger.error() including error object
Follow pattern from docs.loader.ts

tasks.input_state: CalcomClient exists with auth headers, no error handling
tasks.output_state: CalcomClient methods include try-catch blocks with structured logging for API failures
tasks.acceptance_criterion: CalcomClient methods wrap fetch calls in try-catch with logger.error calls including context object

tasks.name: Create fetchUpcomingBookings public function

action.target: Exported fetchUpcomingBookings function that uses CalcomClient

tasks.purpose: Provide public API for fetching upcoming coaching sessions from Cal.com

constraints: Function signature: fetchUpcomingBookings(email: string): Promise<CalcomBooking[]>
Filter by attendeeEmail parameter
Filter by status=accepted
Return bookings array from response
Return empty array on error (graceful degradation)
Export as top-level function

tasks.input_state: CalcomClient exists with auth and logging, no public fetch function
tasks.output_state: fetchUpcomingBookings function exported from calcom-client.ts that queries Cal.com V2 API
tasks.acceptance_criterion: fetchUpcomingBookings function exists and is exported, accepts email parameter, queries /bookings endpoint with filters, returns CalcomBooking array
